mapper.select: SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(B PK_BOARD) */ B.BOARD_MST_ID, B.BOARD_ID, B.USER_ID, B.TITLE, CAST(B.CONTENT AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS CONTENT FROM ADMIN.BOARD B WHERE B.BOARD_MST_ID = #{boardMstId} ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.BOARD_MST_ID, B.BOARD_ID, B.USER_ID, B.TITLE, CAST(B.CONTENT AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS CONTENT
FROM ADMIN.BOARD B WHERE B.BOARD_MST_ID = #{boardMstId} AND B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
